creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2012-04-10 16:33:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/drupal7-jailadmin Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  This Drupal 7 module makes administration of FreeBSD vnet jails extremely
  easy. When combined with ZFS and vnet, FreeBSD jails make for a basic
  cloud-like infrastructure.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/lattera/drupal-jailadmin
  
  PR:             ports/165632
  Submitted by:   Shawn Webb <bsdports@wayfair.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3152    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +42 -0     ports/www/drupal7-jailadmin/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/drupal7-jailadmin/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/drupal7-jailadmin/pkg-descr (new)
